title: lappula heteracantha
intro: Lappula heteracantha, also known as prickly gromwell or hairy lappula, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lappula heteracantha include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as tea, tincture, or capsules, and it can also be applied topically to wounds and skin irritations for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
